objectives.description: Stabilize L3 execution_success as foundation for higher capability levels
objectives.success_criteria: execution_success >= 0.7 with zero test rollbacks in the cycle

tasks.title: Assess current execution_success baseline
tasks.verification_evidence: execution_success current value (0.45) recorded in episodic_log scores snapshot

tasks.title: Propose and apply change targeting execution_success
tasks.gate_condition: no existing capability covers execution_success with accumulated delta >= 0.25
tasks.verification_evidence: hypothesis accepted by SelfEditEngine: tests pass, commit_hash non-null, proposal written to self_edit/proposals/

tasks.title: Verify execution_success progress toward 0.7
tasks.gate_condition: result.accepted is True and result.commit_hash is not None
tasks.verification_evidence: reassessed execution_success shows monotone improvement; target 0.7 logged in next cycle's episodic_log
